result.status_detail: PII warning rendered with '차단'; W3 config-snapshot regression not observed on claude.ai
result.warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

notes: W3 config-snapshot regression check (baseline OK). claude.ai logged in (default Chrome profile). Hard-reloaded /new, pasted '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (paste verified in input via clipboard sentinel readback), submitted. After 60s, full-page clipboard capture showed the assistant turn followed by the PII-block warning bubble containing '차단': '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.'. PASS — W3 13-field shared_ptr snapshot collapse did not break warning rendering. Verification via clipboard select-all (windows-mcp Scrape DOM tool errored 'vertical_scroll_percent'; CDP profile was logged out of claude.ai so DOM/console read used GUI clipboard path instead). console_errors not machine-readable for this window (no CDP); warning rendered correctly which is the regression signal.
